nodes.name: Ringed warbling finch
nodes.summary: Ringed warbling finch（Microspingus torquatus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Ringed warbling finch。

nodes.name: Microspingus
nodes.summary: Microspingus（Microspingus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联8种鸟类，如Plain-tailed warbling finch、Rusty-browed warbling finch、Buff-throated warbling finch等8种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界

nodes.name: Ringed warbling finch
nodes.summary: The ringed warbling finch (Microspingus torquatus) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, and Paraguay. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests, subtropical or tropical dry shrubland, and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. References
